title: stachys alopecuros subsp. jacquinii
intro: Stachys alopecuros subsp. jacquinii, also known as the lamb's tongue or hedgehog plant, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys alopecuros subsp. jacquinii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
